title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC are on the latest version
scenario: Verify language update via 1-step DFU on Charge Case when both Earbuds and Charge Case are on the latest firmware version.
steps: Start app with Osprey, EB (Earbuds) and CC (Charge Case) on the latest firmware version.
After completing the language change, verify the language is properly updated on the Charge Case by navigating menus via touchscreen.
expected: Software update screen is displayed. After completing the language change, the language is properly updated on the Charge Case.
